messages.content:
@everyone

Here’s what I was watching on the SPX puts trade.

The key shift was Dealer Positioning moving from the 6900 Anchor down toward 6850 after price rejected both the anchor and flip level.

Once 6900 failed to hold and positioning rotated lower, downside became asymmetric.

That’s when the 6890P made sense.

messages.content:
**🔥 NDX 0DTE Call Recap — +367.5%**
@here 
**BTO:** 8x NDX 25350C @ **$15.85** (1:50 PM)
**STC:** 8x NDX 25350C @ **$74.10** (3:07 PM)
📈 **+367.5% | +$46,600**

**🧠 Breakdown:**
• Initial upside structure **failed** → mapped support below
• Price **swept prior lows** + printed a **pinbar reversal**
• **RSI divergence** + **volume exhaustion** at the lows
• Strong **impulse off lows** confirmed reversal
• Waited for **1-min Golden Zone (0.5)** pullback
• **Volume confirmation** on GZ entry
• Targeted **previous highs** → exited into expansion

**Key takeaway:**
Failed structure → liquidity sweep → confirmation → **patient GZ entry**.
No chasing. Let price come to you.
